category_sources: source_facts.description says checks for bashisms in shell scripts; Debian manpage says it checks /bin/sh scripts for possible bashisms.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is checkbashisms; Debian manpage NAME section uses checkbashisms.
docs_sources: Official Debian manpage documents synopsis, description, options, exit values, and authorship for checkbashisms.
repo_sources: source_facts.source-archive is Debian devscripts; Debian Salsa has the official devscripts source-control project that contains checkbashisms.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies shell bashism checks; Debian manpage describes POSIX-related bashism detection and linter mode.
